note: DreamHost APPLY: first real deploy through the pipe. Installs tnc-jarvis-v3 3.1.0 (new companion plugin, additive/scoped) and updates tuanichat-platform to 1.23.3 (PWA honesty fixes C3+C5, one file changed). Each module is sha256-pinned, backed up, atomically swapped, php-l verified, and auto-rolled-back on any failure. Already-active plugins update without re-activation; tnc-jarvis-v3 is a NEW plugin so activate=true (needs wp-cli, else ACTIVATION_PENDING -> one wp-admin click).

tnc-jarvis-v3.changelog: Unified ARC REACTOR across Command + Lead Engine + Lead Hunter; real-time REST cockpit binding (tnc-jarvis-live.js); LIVE/EST/PENDING provenance badges; honest source-health grid. Additive/scoped; does not modify tuanichat-platform.

tuanichat-platform.changelog: PWA honesty fixes: C5 self_heals_today now reads a REAL daily counter (was hard-coded 0); C3 self_heal/ack_alert now do real bounded work and count only verified repairs (were fake {handled:true} no-ops). One file changed: modules/tnc-pwa/module-pwa.php. No schema/SQL change.
